source_of_truth.preferred: Google Sheet for week 1, then HubSpot or Attio

crm.decision_rule: Use the tool Flashpoint will actually keep updated; do not let CRM implementation delay testing.

company_discovery.preferred: Manual research, Clay, Apollo, then DiscoLike if universe sizing is needed
guardrails: client approval required for paid data
domain include list required for scoped searches
no export until segment logic is approved

signal.preferred: Manual research plus Clay/BirdDog/Trigify after signal proof
signal.decision_rule: Only automate signals that change account routing or message strategy.

guardrails: no sending until domains, suppression, unsubscribe, bounce handling, and approval gates are defined
copy quality score must be 85 or higher

notes: No real vendor integrations are enabled by default.
Client should pay or reimburse Flashpoint-specific CRM, data, enrichment, domains, and sequencing costs.
